title: WWOO Islands
description: Switch the world generation of WWOO to flying islands. (addon for William Wythers Overhauled Overworld)
body:
WWOO Islands worldgen is an addon for **[William Wythers Overhauled Overworld](https://modrinth.com/datapack/william-wythers-overhauled-overworld-(datapack))**, which changes the world generation to floating islands. ### If you prefer to add a new floating dimension, instead of modifying the overworld, look at [WWOO Islands Dimension](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wwoo-islands-dimension) ## Installation - Download this datapack. - Download official [WWOO Worldgen](https://modrinth.com/datapack/william-wythers-overhauled-overworld-datapack). - Create a new world and drag the datapacks upon world’s creation. - Put the WWOO Islands on top (above WWOO). - Make sure the spawn is correct. ## Islands densities (Patreon feature) You can chose islands density between 5 values: tiny, small, medium, large and massive. A different datapack can be downloaded for each density.
Patreon Supporters - **26.1 (10/04/2026):** Setsu-P, varinyc, nfnpgllxhn - **1.21.11 (28/01/2026):** Azerxim, Setsu-P, varinyc, nfnpgllxhn - **1.21.9 (12/10/2025):** CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, varinyc, Setsu-P, Wani P, Lionel Felke - **1.21.2 (2024-12-02):** Delivator, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, Aidan McCreary, varinyc, Setsu-P, Maximilian Adler, ODS, Jamie B - **1.21 (2024-07-04):** 아아앨, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Aidan McCreary, Azerxim, Setsu-P, Gaming Grotto, Kobe Prokopetz - **1.20.5+ (2024-06-10):** 아아앨, EXcore, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Memick Kung, Aidan McCreary, Setsu-P, Multi-Flamme - **1.20.4 (2024-01-08):** Angelo Russo, 깔수, Screaming Man, ZMH, CYKLOPPS, Darklad32, God Emperor Leto II Atriedes - **1.20.2 rewritten (2023-11-23):** Angelo Russo, 깔수, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, God Emperor Leto II Atriedes - **Mineshafts & Ancient Cities (2023-09-19):** Angelo Russo, 깔수, Eleanor Blackwood, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, ZMH, TerfyHorizon - **1.20 (2023-07-06):** Delivator, Jonathan Fanelli, Angelo Russo, Phantom-Glitch-Wolf, John Stampe, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, ZMH, Yokie, Deadlot3, Darklad32 - **Islands noise V2 (2023-04-10):** Jonathan Fanelli, Angelo Russo, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, ZMH, Darklad32 - **V1 (2022-09-28):** Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF
Patreon Version The free versions are designed to be fun and fully playable. The Patreon version is for players and server owners who want more control, comfort, and flexibility through an in-game settings menu to tweak the parameters live, without file editing. Becoming a Gold Patreon also means: - Getting access to every Patreon versions of every projects. - Getting your name listed in each project and on this page (see above). - Supporting long-term development, updates, and new features 💛
